positive: A stylized, mystical depiction of a lunar crescent glowing over a minimalist forest silhouette. The foreground features abstract geometric elements like interconnected lines and simple, stylized stars. The color palette should be deep indigo, celestial sapphire blue, shimmering silver, and hints of phosphorescent teal. The forest silhouette is rendered in pure black, providing maximum contrast against the glowing, atmospheric background. Composition should be centralized and balanced, suitable for printing on apparel. Clean lines, high contrast, vector-art quality, woodcut style influence, graphic design, maximal symmetry, ethereal glow, perfect print quality, detailed yet simple.
